data.body:
Implemented + validated + pushed epic 97e7-cf42-5c00-462c (minor-haste-ogle / P1.4 — Bounded git growth via stock gc + union recovery).

DECOMPOSITION: 4 child tasks, dependency-ordered so each leaves the suite green:
- WU-1 (382f-20bc-93c0-48b8) re-enable stock gc — independent
- WU-3 (7dc7-d076-8b98-42f4) .gitattributes merge=ours — independent, precedes WU-2
- WU-2 (4a7e-0094-91e7-4413) union merge in sync.py — depends_on WU-3
- WU-4 (2e77-0e50-abdf-4b43) docs+invariant — depends_on WU-1/2/3
A subagent validated the decomposition COMPLETE & ACCURATE before implementation.

IMPLEMENTATION (4 commits on main, suite green at each step):
- f63d7266 WU-1: deleted _ensure_gc_auto_zero + all four 'git config gc.auto 0' writes (event_append.py, txn.py x2, compact.py, init.py). init now _migrate_gc_config: idempotent '--unset gc.auto' (heals legacy) + 'gc.autoDetach=true', on fresh + re-init.
- b0503783 WU-3: tickets-branch .gitattributes merge=ours for .bridge_state/* + .reconciler-*. GOTCHA the epic text omitted (caught empirically): merge=ours is a silent no-op unless merge.ours.driver=true is configured; init now sets it.
- db48f768 WU-2: sync.py _do_reconverge Path 1 now _union_merge('--allow-unrelated-histories') reusing the diverged-path conflict net; ff-adopt reset + WS3 HEAD-measure fix unchanged. No orphaning reset --hard remains.
- 5ea75a08 WU-4: docs/concurrency.md + sync.py docstring rewritten to the non-destructive-recovery safety invariant.

TESTS (new): test_gc_config.py, test_gitattributes_merge.py, test_sync_union_recovery.py. Full non-integration suite: 2450 passed, 1 PRE-EXISTING unrelated failure (test_signature.py::test_foreign_key_round_trip_via_file_swap — confirmed fails identically at baseline 6426ab81).

VALIDATION: adversarial subagent verdict FULLY IMPLEMENTED & ADEQUATELY TESTED. MCP-coverage nuance: the gc-removal runs on the shared WRITE path (all MCP write tools, via event_append/txn/compact) and union-merge on the shared reconverge seam (all MCP reads) — 'init' is NOT the only affected code; no MCP-specific test owed because the write change is a contract-invariant deletion and sync is a single surface-agnostic seam covered at the library level.

STATUS: epic + all 4 children closed; commits pushed to origin/main.
